title: Dr Magic Snatch A Dye Colour Catcher 20's (Pack of 12)
features: The must have for your washing machine!
Dr magic snatch a dye makes colour run a thing of the past and keeps your colours crisp and sharp.
description: Product description Product Description Dr Magic snatch a dye makes colour run a thing of the past and keeps your colours crisp and sharp. Using our advanced formula Dr Magic snatch a dye will help snatch running dyes and dirt from your washing helping your laundry to look as good as new.
